title: Koothankulam Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Koothankulam Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Koonthankulam Bird Sanctuary or Kunthankulam is a 1.2933 km2 (0.4993 sq mi) protected area declared as a sanctuary in 1994.
overview.description: Koonthankulam Bird Sanctuary or Kunthankulam is a 1.2933 km2 (0.4993 sq mi) protected area declared as a sanctuary in 1994. It adjoins the tiny village of Koonthankulam in Nanguneri Taluk of Tirunelveli district, Tamil Nadu, India. It is just 38 km away from Tirunelveli (a bustling town on the banks of the Thamirabarani River). 8.58102°N 77.76123°E / 8.58102; 77.76123 It is composed of Koonthankulam and Kadankulam irrigation tanks, conveniently linked by tar road.

topPlaces.name: Moolakaraipatti
topPlaces.description: Moolakaraipatti is a Panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Ambalam
topPlaces.description: Ambalam is a small village in Nanguneri taluk, Tirunelveli District, Tamil Nadu, India. Ambalam has two parts: South Ambalam and North Ambalam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Koothankulam Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Koothankulam Bird Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Koothankulam Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (93 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (90 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Koothankulam Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Koothankulam Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Koothankulam Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Koothankulam Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Koothankulam Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Moolakaraipatti, Ambalam.
